noBlueProductAccent.details: MGScreens.swift uses Color(red: 0.22, green: 0.54, blue: 1.0) (active blue) for tab selection highlight in MGAnimatedTabBar.

iphoneArchitecture.details: Persistent four-tab layout implemented (Spaces, Activity, Workspace, Settings) instead of exactly two primary root screens (Spaces, Chat) with swipeable panels for Settings and Activity.

noWebViewShell.details: Built using native SwiftUI View elements.

noAvatarCircles.details: MGGoogleAvatar utilizes a Circle shape to clip the Google account avatar.
